title: DBPS Event
description: Canonical JSON schema for a DimensionalBase event (DBPS v1.0 Section 13).

type.description: Event type. See Section 13 for exact triggering conditions.

path.description: The path of the entry that triggered this event.

data.description: Event-specific payload. Contents vary by event type.

source_owner.description: The agent whose action triggered this event, if applicable.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (float64) when the event was fired.
